title: buchnera rupestris
intro: Buchnera rupestris, also known as the "stone-loving Buchnera," is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Buchnera rupestris include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve symptoms of respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs. Buchnera rupestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
